steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The decisive clue: excavation requires “weeks or even months of hard, physically tiring work.” This describes a demanding, labor-intensive process.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Difficult” directly fits—hard, physically tiring labor spanning weeks or months defines a difficult process. The other three either contradict the evidence (rapid contradicts the timeline) or introduce unsupported ideas (common and cheap). That matches choice A — A is correct.
